title: EDA: OMD local stack + ingestion + lineage + DQ surfaces
description: Understand the problem space before defining goals. Stand up the OMD docker-compose locally, walk the UI, identify: (1) which OMD services/containers are mandatory vs optional, (2) the supported Spark lineage capture mechanisms (OpenLineage listener vs metadata-ingestion CLI vs spark-lineage agent) and which gives the most visible edges with least setup, (3) the DQ test definition format and the simplest path to a green+red mix, (4) the dashboard surface (built-in vs custom). Pick the sample-data shape: borrow profile-based case-class skeleton from a typical Scala/Spark project but flatten to 2-3 columns. No code yet. Output: short notes file mapping each demo target (lineage / DQ / dashboard) to the OMD primitive that backs it, plus goal candidates drafted against INVEST.
notes: EDA complete 2026-05-28. Notes: .notes/eda.md. Key calls: OMD 1.12.x (jumped past 1.6); OMD Spark Agent jar + 6 conf entries for lineage; UI-driven Test Cases for DQ; built-in Data Insights for dashboard (Superset as stretch). Sample shape: sensor_readings -> sensor_profiles -> sensor_profiles_enriched. INVEST-drafted goal A/B/C ready for lead review and to refine omd-a34.3/.4/.2. Four open questions for lead in notes file.

title: Goal 2 — define after EDA (likely: at least one DQ check passes and one fails, attached to a table, visible in OMD)
description: WHY: to be defined after EDA. WHAT: to be defined after EDA. Tentative direction: configure a DQ suite against a sample table with mixed pass/fail results, browsable in OMD.
notes: To be refined. INVEST check: Independent, Negotiable, Valuable, Estimable, Small, Testable.

title: Goal 1 — define after EDA (likely: end-to-end lineage from source CSV through Spark job to output table is visible in OMD)
description: WHY: to be defined after EDA. WHAT: to be defined after EDA. Tentative direction: a single Spark job reading a sample CSV, writing parquet, and OMD UI shows the lineage edge between them with column-level detail.
notes: To be refined. INVEST check: Independent, Negotiable, Valuable, Estimable, Small, Testable.

title: Goal 3 — define after EDA (likely: a custom dashboard on top of OMD assets demonstrating governance / DQ / lineage rollup)
description: WHY: to be defined after EDA. WHAT: to be defined after EDA. Tentative direction: a dashboard surfacing tables, owners, DQ status, and lineage health from the POC's captured metadata.
notes: To be refined. INVEST check: Independent, Negotiable, Valuable, Estimable, Small, Testable.

title: OMD local docker POC: lineage + DQ + dashboards over sample Spark jobs
description: Working POC to elaborate OpenMetadata from lineage, data-quality, and dashboarding perspectives. Local docker-compose OMD stack + 2-3 sample Spark jobs derived from the upstream profile-based pattern, producing visible end-to-end lineage edges, attached DQ checks, and a dashboard on top of the captured assets. Accuracy of business logic is explicitly NOT a goal — synthetic sample data and simplified jobs are fine. Success = the user can open OMD locally and walk a viewer through lineage, DQ runs, and a dashboard, end to end.
notes: Work order: complete omd-a34.1 (EDA) FIRST. Goals omd-a34.2/.3/.4 are placeholders to be refined with WHY+WHAT (INVEST) only after EDA produces a concrete picture of OMD's lineage/DQ/dashboard surfaces. Do not draft implementations until goals are approved.
